items.name: AUREIX - Spectrum Short Pants
items.description:
A burst of colors, energy, and pure expression. This hoodie is inspired by the spectrum of light — a symbol of courage to stand out and the freedom to express yourself. With bold multicolor graphics and striking snake details, it embodies the raw yet artistic spirit of streetwear.

Designed and presented by AUREIX, every AUREIX Spectrum piece is more than just clothing — it’s a statement.

Release: 2025 | AUREIX Original
